debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
h₀ : 4 ≤ n
⊢ n ^ 2 ≤ n.factorial

proof:
induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | succ k hk ih =>
    calc
      (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) ih
      _ = (k + 1) ! := by rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
successful_attempts:
induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | succ k hk ih =>
    calc
      (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) ih
      _ = (k + 1) ! := by rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
